structured_content.response:
The process `J09A` has been executed successfully.

Key outcomes:
- Temporary table `J09A_temp` was created from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09A`, classified with `ENTSCHEIDUNG` per the specified rules, and joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Customer data was chosen per row: sales data preferred where present, otherwise net data.
- The final dataset was exported to CSV with the required columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- CSV file path:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_0_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_42/J09A.csv`
- Email with this CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables created for this process (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_working`, `J09A_joined`, `J09A_final`) have been deleted.

If you’d like, I can also export or summarize a sample of the resulting data.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id = 'J09A'` has been executed successfully.

Summary of what was done:
- Built a temporary table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09A`, classified with `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, and joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- For each row, selected customer data from `SALES_MASTER` when available; otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- Generated a CSV with these columns:  
  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
- Saved CSV to:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_0_values_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_42/J09A.csv`
- Sent an email with this CSV attached to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all temporary tables: `J09A_temp`, `J09A_working`, `J09A_joined`, `J09A_final`.

If you want, I can:
- Provide a short, anonymized sample of the resulting dataset, or  
- Re-run or adapt this process for a different tour ID.
